title: Question Carousel: Project Type
description: Determine whether the project is greenfield or brownfield

question.text: Is this a new project (greenfield) or are you working with an existing codebase (brownfield)?

options.label: Greenfield
options.description: New project built from scratch — no existing codebase
options.consequences: Full 5-phase workflow starting from problem discovery

options.label: Brownfield
options.description: Extending, refactoring, or adding features to an existing codebase
options.consequences: Scout agent runs first to analyse existing codebase before Phase 0
